headline: Autodesk AWS Marketplace Move Highlights Cloud Adoption And Valuation Upside Potential
summary: Autodesk (NasdaqGS:ADSK) is expanding access to its cloud-based design and make software through a new collaboration with Amazon Web Services (AWS). The company is listing products on AWS Marketplace, giving customers additional options for procurement and billing. This partnership is intended to connect Autodesk users more directly with AWS cloud and AI services for their workflows. For you as an Autodesk watcher, this move sits at the intersection of software, cloud infrastructure, and AI...

headline: The Billionaire Move Nobody Saw Coming: Why Starboard Value Abandoned CRM For These 2 Stocks
summary: Starboard Value, the activist hedge fund led by Jeff Smith, fully exited its positions in Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) and Autodesk (NASDAQ:ADSK) during the first quarter of 2026, disclosed in a 13F filed May 15, 2026. In their place, Smith opened brand-new long positions in Lamb Weston (NYSE:LW) and CarMax (NYSE:KMX), and added to existing stakes in ... The Billionaire Move Nobody Saw Coming: Why Starboard Value Abandoned CRM For These 2 Stocks

headline: What Moved Markets This Week
summary: U.S. stocks ended the week higher as stocks rebounded from an early-week selloff amid latest inflation data. Read more about this week's major events on Wall Street.
